final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for the Changan Origin Q06 launch announcement, with a translucent and visually impactful background image, in the refined restraint of contemporary Chinese automotive brand aesthetics.

Style/medium: presentation cover slide with the quiet confidence of contemporary Chinese automotive brand identity, designed for executive-level product reveal
Composition: centered title hierarchy with generous breathing room, text positioned in the lower third for visual balance against the background image
Subject: main headline "长安起源Q06" with supporting subheadline "将于9月上市" — clean typographic lockup respecting the brand's dignified tonality
Scene/backdrop: abstract atmospheric automotive imagery suggesting motion and innovation through translucent layers — perhaps a hint of vehicle silhouette or dynamic light trails dissolving into mist
Lighting/mood: the hushed anticipation of a product reveal, soft volumetric light suggesting dawn or the quiet before a significant moment
Color palette: cool graphite and silver tones warmed by subtle amber accents, the chromatic restraint of premium Chinese automotive branding
Materials/textures: glass-like translucency with soft depth-of-field, the polished surface quality of a flagship presentation
Text (verbatim): 长安起源Q06 / 将于9月上市
Constraints: text must remain fully legible against background, maintain brand-appropriate dignified tone, suitable for executive presentation context
Avoid: busy cluttered backgrounds, illegible text overlay, generic stock-photo automotive clichés, overly dramatic or aggressive visual language
